mapper.sql: es.SEQ, es.RESUME_SEQ, es.SCORE_TYPE, es.NO, es.NAME, es.DEPTNO, es.DEPTNAME, es.POST_GRADE_NO, es.POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(es.A) AS A, TO_CHAR(es.B) AS B, TO_CHAR(es.C) AS C, TO_CHAR(es.D) AS D, TO_CHAR(es.E) AS E, TO_CHAR(es.N) AS N, TO_CHAR(es.O) AS O, TO_CHAR(es.S) AS S, TO_CHAR(NVL(es.A,0)+NVL(es.B,0)+NVL(es.C,0)+NVL(es.D,0) +NVL(es.E,0)+NVL(es.N,0)+NVL(es.O,0)+NVL(es.S,0)) AS SUM_SCORE, es.ACTIVITY, TO_CHAR(es.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(es.CREATED_BY) || ' ' || es.CREATED_IP AS CREATED_BY, TO_CHAR(es.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS UPDATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(es.UPDATED_BY) || ' ' || es.UPDATED_IP AS UPDATED_BY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVS_SCORE ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, SCORE_TYPE, NO, NAME, DEPTNO, DEPTNAME, POST_GRADE_NO, POST_GRADE_NAME, A, B, C, D, E, N, O, S, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scoreType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{a, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{b, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{c, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{d, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{e, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{n, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{o, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{s, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{activity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'), #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_SCORE SET SCORE_TYPE = #{scoreType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NO = #{no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NAME = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNO = #{deptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPTNAME = #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NO = #{postGradeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, POST_GRADE_NAME = #{postGradeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, A = NVL(#{a, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), B = NVL(#{b, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), C = NVL(#{c, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), D = NVL(#{d, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), E = NVL(#{e, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), N = NVL(#{n, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), O = NVL(#{o, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), S = NVL(#{s, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), ACTIVITY = NVL(#{activity, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '1'), UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: UPDATE EVS_SCORE SET ACTIVITY = 2, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
